changeSet.author: openk9
changeSet.comment: Rename duplicate names in rag_configuration table by appending a numeric suffix
changeSet.sql: MERGE INTO rag_configuration rc USING ( SELECT id, name, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY name ORDER BY id) AS rn FROM rag_configuration ) dn ON (rc.id = dn.id AND dn.rn > 1) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET rc.name = rc.name || '_' || (dn.rn - 1);

changeSet.author: openk9
changeSet.comment: Rename duplicate names in embedding_model table by appending a numeric suffix
changeSet.sql: MERGE INTO embedding_model em USING ( SELECT id, name, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY name ORDER BY id) AS rn FROM embedding_model ) dn ON (em.id = dn.id AND dn.rn > 1) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET em.name = em.name || '_' || (dn.rn - 1);

changeSet.author: openk9
changeSet.comment: Rename duplicate names in large_language_model table by appending a numeric suffix
changeSet.sql: MERGE INTO large_language_model llm USING ( SELECT id, name, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY name ORDER BY id) AS rn FROM large_language_model ) dn ON (llm.id = dn.id AND dn.rn > 1) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET llm.name = llm.name || '_' || (dn.rn - 1);
